reason: The statement applies because the text fragment describes the Hebrews, specifically Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, who were in the province of Babylon and refused to worship the golden image set up by Nebuchadnezzar, a foreign king. This refusal led to their persecution and miraculous deliverance by God from the fiery furnace, showcasing their faithfulness to their own God and not bowing down to foreign gods.
